title: Dense Spicy Russian Sausage Grill
description: A hearty, spicy dish featuring dense sausage and a flavorful yakimono-grill. Low-sodium-friendly options are available.

ingredients.name: Russian-style egg noodles
ingredients.notes: or substitute with regular egg noodles

ingredients.name: Sour cream
ingredients.notes: low-sodium option: mix 1/4 cup plain Greek yogurt with 3/4 cup water

instructions: Slice the kielbasa sausage into 1-inch pieces
In a large skillet, cook the sliced onion, bell pepper, and jalapeno over medium-high heat until tender, about 5 minutes
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute
Add the sliced sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes
In a large bowl, combine the cooked sausage mixture, Russian-style egg noodles, and Russian-style mustard
Transfer the mixture to the preheated yakimono-grill and cook for 10 minutes
Remove from heat and top with sour cream and chopped parsley (if using)
